metadata.note: Every Twitch user's twin shares identical bytecode, so this descriptor applies to every twin address. It clear-signs the SELF-CUSTODY (owner-EOA) path only — execute/setOwnerEOA via Twitch JWT are authorized at the Twitch consent screen, which wallets cannot render (see AUDIT_RESPONSE.md, Finding 2). The `deployments` address is a placeholder; wallets should match by identical bytecode/ABI across twin instances, and it must be updated per the v1.1 deploy.

setOwnerEOA(address newOwner, uint256 _n.intent: Link a self-custody wallet to your SocialTwin

rotateOwnerEOA(address newOwner).intent: Move your SocialTwin to a new wallet
